title: Complete #143 re-peg: add recovered files to the PLURAL file-size baseline (debt-gates)
intent: Finish PR #143's re-peg. #143 updated ci/file_size_baseline.json (root, used by the standalone file-size-check job) but NOT app/ci/file_sizes_baseline.json (plural, used by the debt-gates file-size sub-gate). debt-gates has therefore been red on main since #143. Peg the four oversized recovered/pre-existing files into the plural baseline.

diff_articulation.what_changed: app/ci/file_sizes_baseline.json: add four entries (violation_count 146->150), inserted in line-descending order: tests/cam/test_manufacturing_replay_intelligence.py (1154), app/cam/manufacturing_replay_registry.py (771), app/routers/cam/manufacturing_replay_router.py (612), app/rmos/runs_v2/api_runs.py (503). These are the files debt-gates' file-size sub-gate flagged after CI-RED-003 (#144) cleared the complexity red that was masking this file-size red.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: These files were pegged into the ROOT baseline by #143 but never into the PLURAL baseline that debt-gates uses, so the gates drifted apart. This finishes the re-peg. Each size was verified real, not blessed blindly: the 1154-line test is 100 lean tests (~11 lines/test) across 11 component classes, dead-center of the repo's established tests/cam/ distribution (siblings at 1370/1214/1209/1153 already baselined) — peg, not split; the registry (771) is 33 register/get/list+filter functions backing the 33-route API; the router (612) is the 33 verified-distinct endpoints; api_runs (503) is real RMOS-runs API, barely over threshold.

commands_run: debt-gates file-size step on #144 flagged exactly these four files (1154/771/612/503) after the complexity red was cleared
1154-test verified LEAN not god-object: 100 test fns, 157 asserts, 11 classes 1:1 with the bundle surface (~11 lines/test); matches repo precedent (52 test files baselined, several >1154)
registry 771 verified real: 33 functions (register/get/list + filters for 4 resource families), single registry class
api_runs 503 verified real file size; the #141 leftover is a misplaced ROOT-baseline ENTRY position, independent of this file's size and the plural baseline
batch_router.py deliberately NOT pegged: CI-RED-003 (#144) relocates it to 484 (<500) rather than blessing growth

files.intent: Peg the four verified-real oversized files into the plural baseline debt-gates uses
files.behavior_change: ci - re-pegs the debt-gates file-size sub-gate to the verified-real recovered surface
verification: each size verified real (test lean / registry+router real / api_runs real); none a god-object to split

files.intent: Declare the plural file-size re-peg scope for CBSP21 review
